title: Mindspace Business Parks REIT is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Mindspace Business Parks REIT is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Mindspace Business Parks REIT in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindspace Business Parks REIT:
Mindspace Business Parks REIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindspace Business Parks REIT!
